channel.title: International District Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for International District Events

item.title: 普通话故事会 / 國語故事會
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: International District/Chinatown Branch, Children's Area / 儿童区域 / 兒童區域

在故事会，各年龄层的孩子（从0岁到小学生）和他们的家庭都可以一起享受故事、歌曲和有趣的学习活动。 活动使用普通话进行。------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------在故事會，各年齡層的孩子（從0歲到小學生）和他們的家庭都可以一起享受故事、歌曲和有趣的學習活動。 活動使用國語進行。

From SPL - International District/Chinatown Branch

Event details

item.title: Coffee & Conversations
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: International District/Chinatown Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a snack, some coffee or tea, and to chat with your neighbors!

From SPL - International District/Chinatown Branch

Event details

item.title: REACH - Connecting people experiencing homelessness with help and resources
item.description:
Thursday, March 12, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: International District/Chinatown Branch

REACH will be at the library to get to know our patrons and connect them to resources that they may need.

From SPL - International District/Chinatown Branch

Event details

item.title: 普通话故事会 / 國語故事會
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: International District/Chinatown Branch, Children's Area / 儿童区域 / 兒童區域

在故事会，各年龄层的孩子（从0岁到小学生）和他们的家庭都可以一起享受故事、歌曲和有趣的学习活动。 活动使用普通话进行。------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------在故事會，各年齡層的孩子（從0歲到小學生）和他們的家庭都可以一起享受故事、歌曲和有趣的學習活動。 活動使用國語進行。

From SPL - International District/Chinatown Branch

Event details

item.title: Family Arts & Crafts: Super Mario
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: International District/Chinatown Branch, Study Room

Celebrate the world of Super Mario with crafts!

From SPL - International District/Chinatown Branch

Event details

item.title: 2026 Annual Dinner & Auction
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Sheraton Grand Seattle: Grand Ballroom on Level 2, 1400 6th Avenue, Seattle, WA, 98101

Wing Luke Museum brings you this year’s dinner and auction theme, “New Roots”, and returns to the Sheraton Grand Seattle.

From Wing Luke Museum

Event details

item.title: Chinatown/International District Art Walk
item.description:
Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Chinatown/International District, Seattle

Summer art walk in the Chinatown/International District

From Chinatown/International District Art Walk

Event details
